input: Can you summarize all the types of leave I'm eligible for as a full-time employee?
context: This is a built-in conversation starter.
expected_behavior: Agent should list all leave types from HR-POL-006: PTO (tiered), sick leave (10 days), parental (16/6 weeks), FMLA (12 weeks), bereavement, jury duty (10 days), military leave (12 weeks). May ask about location for US vs UK.
expected_facts: PTO tiered by tenure 15/20/25/30 days|Sick leave 10 days/80 hours|Primary caregiver parental leave 16 weeks paid|Secondary caregiver 6 weeks paid|FMLA up to 12 weeks unpaid|Bereavement 5 days spouse/child/parent|Jury duty up to 10 business days|Military leave 12 weeks differential pay|HR-POL-006
not_expected: Leave types not in the documents

input: What happens during my first 90 days and what is the probationary period policy?
context: This is a built-in conversation starter.
expected_behavior: Agent should describe the onboarding milestones from HR-POL-003: Day 1 orientation, first 30 days (training/check-ins), 60-day review, 90-day formal review. Probation is 90 days with at-will termination.
expected_facts: Day One orientation with morning HR-led and afternoon manager-led sessions|Mandatory training within first two weeks|Weekly 1:1 check-ins|30-Day Onboarding Feedback Form|60-day mid-probation review with initial OKRs|90-day formal probation review|Probation 90 days|Either party may end employment with or without cause|HR-POL-003
not_expected: Generic onboarding advice not from the document

input: What health insurance options are available to employees?
context: This is a built-in conversation starter.
expected_behavior: Agent should describe the three BlueCross BlueShield plans from HR-POL-007 with specific deductibles and premiums.
expected_facts: Plan A HDHP deductible $1500/$3000 premium $0 employee|Plan B PPO Standard deductible $750/$1500 premium $85/mo copay $25 PCP|Plan C PPO Premium deductible $300/$600 premium $185/mo|HSA company contributes $750 individual or $1500 family|Full-time eligible first day of month after hire|HR-POL-007
not_expected: Health plan details not in the document

input: How much notice do I need to give before taking parental leave?
context: This is a built-in conversation starter.
expected_behavior: Agent should cite HR-POL-006 Section 10: parental leave requires 30 days notice before start. May also note primary caregiver can begin up to 2 weeks before due/placement date.
expected_facts: Parental leave requires 30 days notice|Primary caregiver leave may begin up to 2 weeks before due date or placement|6 months continuous employment required|HR-POL-006

input: What are the company's paid holidays this year?
context: This is a built-in conversation starter.
expected_behavior: Agent should list all 14 holidays plus 2 floating holidays from HR-POL-006 Section 4. Should note the Saturday/Sunday observance rule.
expected_facts: New Year's Day|MLK Day|Presidents' Day|Memorial Day|Juneteenth|Independence Day|Labor Day|Columbus/Indigenous Peoples' Day|Veterans Day|Thanksgiving|Day after Thanksgiving|Christmas Eve|Christmas Day|New Year's Eve|2 floating holidays|Saturday holiday observed Friday|Sunday holiday observed Monday|HR-POL-006
not_expected: Holidays not listed in the document

input: What were the key discussion points from the last board meeting?
context: This is a built-in conversation starter.
expected_behavior: Agent should summarize the Q1 2025 board meeting (BOARD-MIN-2025-Q1): CEO report on 127 new enterprise logos; NRR 118%; revenue $48.3M +14.2% YoY; Analytix Labs acquisition $12.2M; new CRO Aisha M. Osei; FY2025 guidance raised to $195M-$202M.
expected_facts: 127 new enterprise logos vs 98 in Q1 2024|NRR 118%|Revenue $48.3M up 14.2% YoY|Analytix Labs acquisition $12.2M cash|New CRO Aisha M. Osei effective March 3 2025|FY2025 guidance raised to $195M-$202M|Gross margin 62.4%|BOARD-MIN-2025-Q1
